label: Transparent Queen Anne's lace motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Queen Anne's Lace transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete Queen Anne's lace umbel isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: White lace flower umbel, fern-green leaves, dry grass meadow hints, crisp fine botanical detail, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal, no shadows, gradients, texture, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no bouquet, no vase, no hand, no landscape.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Queen Anne's Lace light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn board named Morphous Queen Anne's Lace, derived from white lace umbels, fern green, and dry grass neutrals.
Required visible sections: palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and asset examples.
Style: airy dashboard system with spacious tables, lace-like dividers, fern filters, dry-grass muted panels, and readable labels.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Queen Anne's Lace dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode translation with meadow-dusk surfaces, lace-white foregrounds, fern-green controls, dry-grass accents, and airy dashboard coverage.
Required visible sections: dark mode palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and asset examples.
